response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven full-stack versatility with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership via GISCollective and workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core technical requirements
Experience with AI systems is implied but not demonstrated as production-grade or enterprise-scale
Lacks clear evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders
